requirements.statement: Guide pages render from markdown sources at build time.
requirements.why: Stale rendered guides ship wrong instructions silently.

requirements.statement: Guides are re-rendered nightly by a batch job.
requirements.why: Predecessor of the streaming contract; kept for history.

requirements.statement: Guides re-render on change via the streaming pipeline, not nightly.
requirements.why: Nightly batches left up to 24h of stale guidance live.

requirements.statement: The sidebar export lists every published guide exactly once.
requirements.why: Duplicate or missing sidebar entries break navigation.
